title: Nephrodium lepinei
taxonomy: Nephrodium lepinei is a type of fern, specifically belonging to the family Matoniaceae. It is classified under the genus Nephrodium, which is a group of extinct ferns. The family Matoniaceae is a part of the larger division Polypodiophyta, which includes all ferns. Within the class Polypodiopsida, Nephrodium lepinei is a member of the order Matoniales. This fern is considered an ancient species with unique characteristics.
uses: Nephrodium lepinei is actually an ancient genus of ferns, however, its direct relation to modern ferns is known, the modern fern genus is now known as Blechnum.
